# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "myapp/setup-automation",
    "description": "Application with automated setup via Composer scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1",
        "monolog/monolog": "^3.0",
        "symfony/console": "^6.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@run-setup-scripts",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@display-complete-message"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@run-setup-scripts",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@display-complete-message"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p public/assets/css public/assets/js public/assets/fonts public/assets/images",
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log var/tmp",
            "mkdir -p storage/uploads storage/backups",
            "chmod -R 775 var/ storage/"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css -o public/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css",
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js -o public/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jquery@3.7.0/dist/jquery.min.js -o public/assets/js/jquery.min.js",
            "curl -sL https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css -o public/assets/css/fontawesome.min.css",
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/alpinejs@3.13.0/dist/cdn.min.js -o public/assets/js/alpine.min.js"
        ],
        "run-setup-scripts": [
            "php scripts/setup/generate-env.php",
            "php scripts/setup/initialize-config.php",
            "php scripts/setup/migrate-database.php",
            "php scripts/setup/seed-default-data.php",
            "php scripts/setup/generate-app-key.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "php scripts/assets/compile-scss.php",
            "php scripts/assets/minify-js.php",
            "php scripts/assets/optimize-images.php",
            "php scripts/assets/generate-manifest.php"
        ],
        "display-complete-message": [
            "echo ''",
            "echo '============================================'",
            "echo '  Application setup completed successfully!'",
            "echo '============================================'",
            "echo ''",
            "echo 'Next steps:'",
            "echo '  1. Review .env configuration'",
            "echo '  2. Run: php bin/console serve'",
            "echo '  3. Visit: http://localhost:8000'",
            "echo ''"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "rm -rf var/cache/*",
            "php scripts/setup/warm-cache.php",
            "echo 'Cache cleared and warmed successfully.'"
        ],
        "reset-database": [
            "php scripts/setup/drop-database.php",
            "php scripts/setup/migrate-database.php",
            "php scripts/setup/seed-default-data.php",
            "echo 'Database reset completed.'"
        ],
        "test": [
            "@php vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=always"
        ],
        "lint": [
            "php -l src/",
            "php -l scripts/"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup-directories": "Creates required application directories with proper permissions",
        "download-assets": "Downloads frontend libraries and assets from CDN URLs",
        "run-setup-scripts": "Executes PHP setup scripts for environment, config, database, and app key generation",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles SCSS, minifies JS, optimizes images, and generates asset manifest",
        "display-complete-message": "Displays setup completion message with next steps",
        "clear-cache": "Clears and warms the application cache",
        "reset-database": "Drops, recreates, and seeds the database",
        "test": "Runs the PHPUnit test suite",
        "lint": "Checks PHP files for syntax errors"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "process-timeout": 300
    }
}
